name: brca_omics_l1
notes: Baseline improvement 2/5: l1_weight=1e-5 adds an L1 penalty on the first linear layer's weights (1000 genes × 128 hidden units = 128k weights). Cox PH loss is O(1) after normalisation by n_events; at O(0.1) average weight magnitude a 1e-5 coefficient adds ~0.13 to the loss — mild sparsity pressure that encourages the model to ignore uninformative genes rather than fitting noise. The L1 penalty complements weight_decay (L2), which shrinks all weights evenly. All other settings identical to brca_omics_topk1000 (CI=0.6017).
